### Add User

`<mongo:add-user>`

Adds a new user for this database.

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p><strong>Configuration</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Name of the configuration to use.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div><div><p>x</p></div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Username</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Name of the user.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div><div><p>x</p></div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Password</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Password to use for authentication.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div><div><p>x</p></div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Reconnection Strategy</strong></p></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p><a href="#reconnect">Reconnect</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#reconnect-forever">Reconnect Forever</a></p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Retry strategy in case of connectivity errors.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr></tbody></table>

#### Associated Configurations

- [Configuration](#config)

#### Throws

- MONGO:DUPLICATE_ERROR
- MONGO:CONSISTENCY_ERROR
- MONGO:RETRY_EXHAUSTED
- MONGO:NOT_FOUND
- MONGO:PERMISSIONS_DENIED
- MONGO:TIMEOUT
- MONGO:INVALID_INPUT
- MONGO:CONNECTIVITY

### Collection Exists

`<mongo:collection-exists>`

Returns `true` if the specified collection exists.

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p><strong>Configuration</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Name of the configuration to use.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div><div><p>x</p></div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Collection Name</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Name of the collection.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div><div><p>x</p></div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Target Variable</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Name of the variable that stores the operationâs output.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Target Value</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Expression that evaluates the operationâs output. The expression outcome is stored in the target variable.</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p><code>#[payload]</code></p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Reconnection Strategy</strong></p></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p><a href="#reconnect">Reconnect</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#reconnect-forever">Reconnect Forever</a></p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Retry strategy in case of connectivity errors.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr></tbody></table>

#### Output

<table><colgroup><col> <col></colgroup><tbody><tr><td><p>Type</p></td><td><p>Boolean</p></td></tr></tbody></table>

#### Associated Configurations

- [Configuration](#config)

#### Throws

- MONGO:CONSISTENCY_ERROR
- MONGO:RETRY_EXHAUSTED
- MONGO:NOT_FOUND
- MONGO:PERMISSIONS_DENIED
- MONGO:TIMEOUT
- MONGO:INVALID_INPUT
- MONGO:CONNECTIVITY

### Count Documents

`<mongo:count-documents>`

Counts the number of documents that match the given query. If no query is passed, the operation
returns the number of elements in the collection.

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p><strong>Configuration</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Name of the configuration to use.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div><div><p>x</p></div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Collection Name</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Target collection.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div><div><p>x</p></div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Query</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Binary</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Query for counting documents. Only documents matching the query are counted. If unspecified, all documents are counted. Values can be <code>{"field1": "value1"}</code> or can contain operators <code>{"field1": {$gte: 1, $lt: 10}}</code>.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Write Concern Acknowledgement</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Level of acknowledgment requested from MongoDB for write operations propagated to the specified number of MongoDB instances. You can specify a number of instances, for example, <code>n&gt;0</code>, or use a value from the list.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Write Concern Timeout</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Number</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Specifies a time limit, in milliseconds, for <strong>Write Concern Acknowledgement</strong>. The value must be greater than <code>1</code>.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Write Concern Timeout Timeunit</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Enumeration, one of:</p></div><div><ul><li><p>NANOSECONDS</p></li><li><p>MICROSECONDS</p></li><li><p>MILLISECONDS</p></li><li><p>SECONDS</p></li><li><p>MINUTES</p></li><li><p>HOURS</p></li><li><p>DAYS</p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Time unit for the <strong>Write Concern Timeout</strong> field.</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p><code>SECONDS</code></p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Target Variable</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Name of the variable that stores the operationâs output.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Target Value</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Expression that evaluates the operationâs output. The expression outcome is stored in the target variable.</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p><code>#[payload]</code></p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Reconnection Strategy</strong></p></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p><a href="#reconnect">Reconnect</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#reconnect-forever">Reconnect Forever</a></p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Retry strategy in case of connectivity errors.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr></tbody></table>

#### Output

<table><colgroup><col> <col></colgroup><tbody><tr><td><p>Type</p></td><td><p>Number</p></td></tr></tbody></table>

#### Associated Configurations

- [Configuration](#config)

#### Throws

- MONGO:DUPLICATE_ERROR
- MONGO:CONSISTENCY_ERROR
- MONGO:RETRY_EXHAUSTED
- MONGO:NOT_FOUND
- MONGO:PERMISSIONS_DENIED
- MONGO:TIMEOUT
- MONGO:INVALID_INPUT
- MONGO:CONNECTIVITY

### Create Collection

`<mongo:create-collection>`

Creates a new collection. If the collection already exists, a `MongoException` is thrown.

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p><strong>Configuration</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Name of the configuration to use.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div><div><p>x</p></div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Collection Name</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Name of the collection to create.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div><div><p>x</p></div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Max Objects</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Number</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Maximum number of documents the new collection contains.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Collection Size</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Number</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Maximum size of the new collection.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Collection Size Data Unit</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Enumeration, one of:</p></div><div><ul><li><p>BYTE</p></li><li><p>KB</p></li><li><p>MB</p></li><li><p>GB</p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Data unit of the <strong>Collection Size</strong> field.</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p><code>BYTE</code></p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Reconnection Strategy</strong></p></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p><a href="#reconnect">Reconnect</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#reconnect-forever">Reconnect Forever</a></p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Retry strategy in case of connectivity errors.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr></tbody></table>

#### Associated Configurations

- [Configuration](#config)

#### Throws

- MONGO:CONSISTENCY_ERROR
- MONGO:RETRY_EXHAUSTED
- MONGO:NOT_FOUND
- MONGO:PERMISSIONS_DENIED
- MONGO:TIMEOUT
- MONGO:INVALID_INPUT
- MONGO:CONNECTIVITY

### Create File

`<mongo:create-file>`

Creates a new file in the database, saving the specified content, file name, content type, and extra
data.

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p><strong>Configuration</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Name of the configuration to use.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div><div><p>x</p></div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Content</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Binary</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Content of the new file. This content is an InputStream.</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p><code>#[payload]</code></p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>x</p></div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Filename</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Name of the new file.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div><div><p>x</p></div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Metadata</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Binary</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>JSON object that holds information to store.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Streaming Strategy</strong></p></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p><a href="#repeatable-in-memory-stream">Repeatable In Memory Stream</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#repeatable-file-store-stream">Repeatable File Store Stream</a></p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Configures how Mule processes streams. Repeatable streams are the default behavior.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Target Variable</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Name of the variable that stores the operationâs output.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Target Value</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Expression that evaluates the operationâs output. The expression outcome is stored in the target variable.</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p><code>#[payload]</code></p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Reconnection Strategy</strong></p></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p><a href="#reconnect">Reconnect</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#reconnect-forever">Reconnect Forever</a></p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Retry strategy in case of connectivity errors.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr></tbody></table>

#### Output

<table><colgroup><col> <col></colgroup><tbody><tr><td><p>Type</p></td><td><p>Binary</p></td></tr></tbody></table>

#### Associated Configurations

- [Configuration](#config)

#### Throws

- MONGO:DUPLICATE_ERROR
- MONGO:CONSISTENCY_ERROR
- MONGO:RETRY_EXHAUSTED
- MONGO:NOT_FOUND
- MONGO:PERMISSIONS_DENIED
- MONGO:TIMEOUT
- MONGO:INVALID_INPUT
- MONGO:CONNECTIVITY

### Create Index

`<mongo:create-index>`

Creates a new index.

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p><strong>Configuration</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Name of the configuration to use.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div><div><p>x</p></div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Collection Name</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Name of the collection in which the index is created.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div><div><p>x</p></div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Field Name</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Name of the field that is indexed.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div><div><p>x</p></div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Sort Order</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Enumeration, one of:</p></div><div><ul><li><p>ASC</p></li><li><p>DESC</p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Indexing order.</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p><code>ASC</code></p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Target Variable</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Name of the variable that stores the operationâs output.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Target Value</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Expression that evaluates the operationâs output. The expression outcome is stored in the target variable.</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p><code>#[payload]</code></p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Reconnection Strategy</strong></p></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p><a href="#reconnect">Reconnect</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#reconnect-forever">Reconnect Forever</a></p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Retry strategy in case of connectivity errors.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr></tbody></table>

#### Output

<table><colgroup><col> <col></colgroup><tbody><tr><td><p>Type</p></td><td><p>String</p></td></tr></tbody></table>

#### Associated Configurations

- [Configuration](#config)

#### Throws

- MONGO:CONSISTENCY_ERROR
- MONGO:RETRY_EXHAUSTED
- MONGO:NOT_FOUND
- MONGO:PERMISSIONS_DENIED
- MONGO:TIMEOUT
- MONGO:INVALID_INPUT
- MONGO:CONNECTIVITY

### Drop Collection

`<mongo:drop-collection>`

Deletes a collection and all the objects it contains. If the collection does not exist, the
operation throws a `NOT_FOUND` error.

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p><strong>Configuration</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Name of the configuration to use.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div><div><p>x</p></div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Collection Name</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Name of the collection to drop.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div><div><p>x</p></div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Reconnection Strategy</strong></p></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p><a href="#reconnect">Reconnect</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#reconnect-forever">Reconnect Forever</a></p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Retry strategy in case of connectivity errors.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr></tbody></table>

#### Associated Configurations

- [Configuration](#config)

#### Throws

- MONGO:CONSISTENCY_ERROR
- MONGO:RETRY_EXHAUSTED
- MONGO:NOT_FOUND
- MONGO:PERMISSIONS_DENIED
- MONGO:TIMEOUT
- MONGO:INVALID_INPUT
- MONGO:CONNECTIVITY

### Drop Database

`<mongo:drop-database>`

Drop the current database.

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p><strong>Configuration</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Name of the configuration to use.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div><div><p>x</p></div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Database Name</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Name of the database to drop.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div><div><p>x</p></div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Reconnection Strategy</strong></p></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p><a href="#reconnect">Reconnect</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#reconnect-forever">Reconnect Forever</a></p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Retry strategy in case of connectivity errors.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr></tbody></table>

#### Associated Configurations

- [Configuration](#config)

#### Throws

- MONGO:DUPLICATE_ERROR
- MONGO:CONSISTENCY_ERROR
- MONGO:RETRY_EXHAUSTED
- MONGO:NOT_FOUND
- MONGO:PERMISSIONS_DENIED
- MONGO:TIMEOUT
- MONGO:INVALID_INPUT
- MONGO:CONNECTIVITY

### Drop Index

`<mongo:drop-index>`

Drops an existing index.

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p><strong>Configuration</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Name of the configuration to use.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div><div><p>x</p></div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Collection Name</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Name of the collection.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div><div><p>x</p></div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Index Name</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Name of the index to drop.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div><div><p>x</p></div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Reconnection Strategy</strong></p></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p><a href="#reconnect">Reconnect</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#reconnect-forever">Reconnect Forever</a></p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Retry strategy in case of connectivity errors.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr></tbody></table>

#### Associated Configurations

- [Configuration](#config)

#### Throws

- MONGO:CONSISTENCY_ERROR
- MONGO:RETRY_EXHAUSTED
- MONGO:NOT_FOUND
- MONGO:PERMISSIONS_DENIED
- MONGO:TIMEOUT
- MONGO:INVALID_INPUT
- MONGO:CONNECTIVITY

### Dump

`<mongo:dump>`

Executes a dump of the database to the specified output directory. If no output directory is
provided, the default /dump directory is used.

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p><strong>Configuration</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Name of the configuration to use.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div><div><p>x</p></div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Output Directory</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Output directory in which dump files are created.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div><div><p>x</p></div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Output Name Prefix</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Output file name prefix. If unspecified, the database name is used.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Oplog</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Boolean</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Point in time backup (requires an oplog).</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p><code>false</code></p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Operation Timeout</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Number</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Maximum wait time for the dump.</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p><code>60</code></p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Operation Timeout Unit</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Enumeration, one of:</p></div><div><ul><li><p>NANOSECONDS</p></li><li><p>MICROSECONDS</p></li><li><p>MILLISECONDS</p></li><li><p>SECONDS</p></li><li><p>MINUTES</p></li><li><p>HOURS</p></li><li><p>DAYS</p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Time unit for the <strong>Operation Timeout</strong> field.</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p><code>SECONDS</code></p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Target Variable</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Name of the variable that stores the operationâs output.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Target Value</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Expression that evaluates the operationâs output. The expression outcome is stored in the target variable.</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p><code>#[payload]</code></p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Reconnection Strategy</strong></p></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p><a href="#reconnect">Reconnect</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#reconnect-forever">Reconnect Forever</a></p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Retry strategy in case of connectivity errors.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr></tbody></table>

#### Output

<table><colgroup><col> <col></colgroup><tbody><tr><td><p>Type</p></td><td><p>Array of String</p></td></tr></tbody></table>

#### Associated Configurations

- [Configuration](#config)

#### Throws

- MONGO:DUPLICATE_ERROR
- MONGO:CONSISTENCY_ERROR
- MONGO:RETRY_EXHAUSTED
- MONGO:NOT_FOUND
- MONGO:PERMISSIONS_DENIED
- MONGO:TIMEOUT
- MONGO:INVALID_INPUT
- MONGO:CONNECTIVITY

### Execute Command

`<mongo:execute-command>`

Executes a command on the database.

The **Execute Command** operation results are not paginated.

If an execution returns a cursor reference, use the `getMore` command to retrieve the next page of
results. Refer to [Additional Configuration Information](mongodb-connector-additional-configuration)
for more details.

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p><strong>Configuration</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Name of the configuration to use.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div><div><p>x</p></div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Command</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Binary</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Command to execute on the database as a document.</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p><code>#[payload]</code></p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Streaming Strategy</strong></p></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p><a href="#repeatable-in-memory-stream">Repeatable In Memory Stream</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#repeatable-file-store-stream">Repeatable File Store Stream</a></p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Configures how Mule processes streams. Repeatable streams are the default behavior.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Target Variable</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Name of the variable that stores the operationâs output.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Target Value</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Expression that evaluates the operationâs output. The expression outcome is stored in the target variable.</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p><code>#[payload]</code></p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Reconnection Strategy</strong></p></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p><a href="#reconnect">Reconnect</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#reconnect-forever">Reconnect Forever</a></p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Retry strategy in case of connectivity errors.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr></tbody></table>

#### Output

<table><colgroup><col> <col></colgroup><tbody><tr><td><p>Type</p></td><td><p>Binary</p></td></tr></tbody></table>

#### Associated Configurations

- [Configuration](#config)

#### Throws

- MONGO:DUPLICATE_ERROR
- MONGO:CONSISTENCY_ERROR
- MONGO:RETRY_EXHAUSTED
- MONGO:NOT_FOUND
- MONGO:PERMISSIONS_DENIED
- MONGO:TIMEOUT
- MONGO:INVALID_INPUT
- MONGO:CONNECTIVITY

### Find Documents

`<mongo:find-documents>`

Finds all documents that match a given query. If no query is specified, all documents of the
collection are retrieved. If no fields object is specified, all fields are retrieved.

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p><strong>Configuration</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Name of the configuration to use.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div><div><p>x</p></div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Query</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Binary</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Query for finding documents. If unspecified, all documents are retrieved. Values can be <code>{"field1": "value1"}</code> or can contain operators <code>{"field1": {$gte: 1, $lt: 10}}</code>.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Sort By</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Binary</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Indicates the document used to sort the results. Use <code>[{"yourField":"ASC"}]</code> to sort by ascending, or <code>[{"yourField":"DESC"}]</code> to sort by descending.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Page Size</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Number</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Size of the documents of each page to return.</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p><code>100</code></p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Limit</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Number</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Limit of the documents to return.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Write Concern Acknowledgement</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Level of acknowledgment requested from MongoDB for write operations propagated to the specified number of MongoDB instances. You can specify a number of instances, for example, <code>n&gt;0</code>, or use a value from the list.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Write Concern Timeout</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Number</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Specifies a time limit, in milliseconds, for <strong>Write Concern Acknowledgement</strong>. The value must be greater than <code>1</code>.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Write Concern Timeout Timeunit</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Enumeration, one of:</p></div><div><ul><li><p>NANOSECONDS</p></li><li><p>MICROSECONDS</p></li><li><p>MILLISECONDS</p></li><li><p>SECONDS</p></li><li><p>MINUTES</p></li><li><p>HOURS</p></li><li><p>DAYS</p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Time unit for the <strong>Write Concern Timeout</strong> field.</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p><code>SECONDS</code></p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Streaming Strategy</strong></p></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p><a href="#repeatable-in-memory-iterable">Repeatable In Memory Iterable</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#repeatable-file-store-iterable">Repeatable File Store Iterable</a></p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Configures how Mule processes streams. Repeatable streams are the default behavior.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Collection Name</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Collection name.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div><div><p>x</p></div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Fields</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Comma-separated list of fields to return from each document. To return all fields, type a single comma character.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div><div><p>x</p></div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Target Variable</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Name of the variable that stores the operationâs output.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Target Value</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Expression that evaluates the operationâs output. The expression outcome is stored in the target variable.</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p><code>#[payload]</code></p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Reconnection Strategy</strong></p></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p><a href="#reconnect">Reconnect</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#reconnect-forever">Reconnect Forever</a></p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Retry strategy in case of connectivity errors.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr></tbody></table>

#### Output

<table><colgroup><col> <col></colgroup><tbody><tr><td><p>Type</p></td><td><p>Array of Binary</p></td></tr></tbody></table>

#### Associated Configurations

- [Configuration](#config)

#### Throws

- MONGO:DUPLICATE_ERROR
- MONGO:CONSISTENCY_ERROR
- MONGO:NOT_FOUND
- MONGO:PERMISSIONS_DENIED
- MONGO:TIMEOUT
- MONGO:INVALID_INPUT
- MONGO:CONNECTIVITY

### Find Files

`<mongo:find-files>`

Lists all files that match the given query.

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p><strong>Configuration</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Name of the configuration to use.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div><div><p>x</p></div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Query</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Binary</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Query for listing all files. Values can be <code>{"field1": "value1"}</code> or can contain operators <code>{"field1": {$gte: 1, $lt: 10}}</code>.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Sort</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Binary</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Enables you to sort the result list. A file is sorted by file ID or upload date.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Target Variable</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Name of the variable that stores the operationâs output.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Target Value</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Expression that evaluates the operationâs output. The expression outcome is stored in the target variable.</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p><code>#[payload]</code></p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Reconnection Strategy</strong></p></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p><a href="#reconnect">Reconnect</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#reconnect-forever">Reconnect Forever</a></p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Retry strategy in case of connectivity errors.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr></tbody></table>

#### Output

<table><colgroup><col> <col></colgroup><tbody><tr><td><p>Type</p></td><td><p>Array of Binary</p></td></tr></tbody></table>

#### Associated Configurations

- [Configuration](#config)

#### Throws

- MONGO:DUPLICATE_ERROR
- MONGO:CONSISTENCY_ERROR
- MONGO:RETRY_EXHAUSTED
- MONGO:NOT-FOUND
- MONGO:PERMISSIONS_DENIED
- MONGO:TIMEOUT
- MONGO:INVALID_INPUT
- MONGO:CONNECTIVITY

### Get File Content

`<mongo:get-file-content>`

Gets an InputStream to the content of the file specified by **File Id**.

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p><strong>Configuration</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Name of the configuration to use.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div><div><p>x</p></div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>File Id</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Binary</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Mandatory file ID.</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p><code>#[payload]</code></p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Target Variable</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Name of the variable that stores the operationâs output.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Target Value</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Expression that evaluates the operationâs output. The expression outcome is stored in the target variable.</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p><code>#[payload]</code></p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Reconnection Strategy</strong></p></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p><a href="#reconnect">Reconnect</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#reconnect-forever">Reconnect Forever</a></p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Retry strategy in case of connectivity errors.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr></tbody></table>

#### Output

<table><colgroup><col> <col></colgroup><tbody><tr><td><p><strong>Type</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Any</p></div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Attributes Type</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Binary</p></div></div></td></tr></tbody></table>

#### Associated Configurations

- [Configuration](#config)

#### Throws

- MONGO:DUPLICATE_ERROR
- MONGO:CONSISTENCY_ERROR
- MONGO:RETRY_EXHAUSTED
- MONGO:NOT_FOUND
- MONGO:PERMISSIONS_DENIED
- MONGO:TIMEOUT
- MONGO:INVALID_INPUT
- MONGO:CONNECTIVITY

### Insert Document

`<mongo:insert-document>`

Inserts a document in a collection. If you do not use the `id` field to specify an object, MongoDB
automatically generates an ID.

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p><strong>Configuration</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Name of the configuration to use.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div><div><p>x</p></div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Collection Name</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Name of the collection in which to insert the given document.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div><div><p>x</p></div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Document</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Binary</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Document to insert.</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p><code>#[payload]</code></p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Write Concern Acknowledgement</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Level of acknowledgment requested from MongoDB for write operations propagated to the specified number of MongoDB instances. You can specify a number of instances, for example, <code>n&gt;0</code>, or use a value from the list.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Write Concern Timeout</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Number</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Specifies a time limit, in milliseconds, for <strong>Write Concern Acknowledgement</strong>. The value must be greater than <code>1</code>.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Write Concern Timeout Timeunit</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Enumeration, one of:</p></div><div><ul><li><p>NANOSECONDS</p></li><li><p>MICROSECONDS</p></li><li><p>MILLISECONDS</p></li><li><p>SECONDS</p></li><li><p>MINUTES</p></li><li><p>HOURS</p></li><li><p>DAYS</p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Time unit for the <strong>Write Concern Timeout</strong> field.</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p><code>SECONDS</code></p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Streaming Strategy</strong></p></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p><a href="#repeatable-in-memory-stream">Repeatable In Memory Stream</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#repeatable-file-store-stream">Repeatable File Store Stream</a></p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Configures how Mule processes streams. Repeatable streams are the default behavior.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Target Variable</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Name of the variable that stores the operationâs output.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Target Value</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Expression that evaluates the operationâs output. The expression outcome is stored in the target variable.</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p><code>#[payload]</code></p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Reconnection Strategy</strong></p></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p><a href="#reconnect">Reconnect</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#reconnect-forever">Reconnect Forever</a></p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Retry strategy in case of connectivity errors.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr></tbody></table>

#### Output

<table><colgroup><col> <col></colgroup><tbody><tr><td><p>Type</p></td><td><p>Binary</p></td></tr></tbody></table>

#### Associated Configurations

- [Configuration](#config)

#### Throws

- MONGO:DUPLICATE_ERROR
- MONGO:CONSISTENCY_ERROR
- MONGO:RETRY_EXHAUSTED
- MONGO:NOT_FOUND
- MONGO:PERMISSIONS_DENIED
- MONGO:TIMEOUT
- MONGO:INVALID_INPUT
- MONGO:CONNECTIVITY

### Insert Documents

`<mongo:insert-documents>`

Inserts a document in a collection. If you donât use the `id` field to specify an object, MongoDB
automatically generates an ID.

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p><strong>Configuration</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Name of the configuration to use.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div><div><p>x</p></div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Collection Name</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Name of the collection in which to insert the given document.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div><div><p>x</p></div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Documents</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Binary</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>List of the documents to insert.</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p><code>#[payload]</code></p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Write Ordered</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Boolean</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Indicates whether the list of documents are executed in order. If set to <code>true</code> and an error occurs during the processing of one of the write operations, MongoDB returns without processing any remaining write operations in the list.</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p><code>false</code></p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Write Concern Acknowledgement</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Level of acknowledgment requested from MongoDB for write operations propagated to the specified number of MongoDB instances. You can specify a number of instances, for example, <code>n&gt;0</code>, or use a value from the list.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Write Concern Timeout</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Number</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Specifies a time limit, in milliseconds, for <strong>Write Concern Acknowledgement</strong>. The value must be greater than <code>1</code>.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Write Concern Timeout Timeunit</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Enumeration, one of:</p></div><div><ul><li><p>NANOSECONDS</p></li><li><p>MICROSECONDS</p></li><li><p>MILLISECONDS</p></li><li><p>SECONDS</p></li><li><p>MINUTES</p></li><li><p>HOURS</p></li><li><p>DAYS</p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Time unit for the <strong>Write Concern Timeout</strong> field.</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p><code>SECONDS</code></p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Target Variable</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Name of the variable that stores the operationâs output.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Target Value</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Expression that evaluates the operationâs output. The expression outcome is stored in the target variable.</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p><code>#[payload]</code></p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Reconnection Strategy</strong></p></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p><a href="#reconnect">Reconnect</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#reconnect-forever">Reconnect Forever</a></p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Retry strategy in case of connectivity errors.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr></tbody></table>

#### Output

<table><colgroup><col> <col></colgroup><tbody><tr><td><p>Type</p></td><td><p><a href="#BulkOperationResult">Bulk Operation Result</a></p></td></tr></tbody></table>

#### Associated Configurations

- [Configuration](#config)

#### Throws

- MONGO:DUPLICATE_ERROR
- MONGO:CONSISTENCY_ERROR
- MONGO:RETRY_EXHAUSTED
- MONGO:NOT_FOUND
- MONGO:PERMISSIONS_DENIED
- MONGO:TIMEOUT
- MONGO:INVALID_INPUT
- MONGO:CONNECTIVITY

### List Collections

`<mongo:list-collections>`

Lists names of collections available on this database.

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p><strong>Configuration</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Name of the configuration to use.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div><div><p>x</p></div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Target Variable</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Name of the variable that stores the operationâs output.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Target Value</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Expression that evaluates the operationâs output. The expression outcome is stored in the target variable.</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p><code>#[payload]</code></p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Reconnection Strategy</strong></p></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p><a href="#reconnect">Reconnect</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#reconnect-forever">Reconnect Forever</a></p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Retry strategy in case of connectivity errors.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr></tbody></table>

#### Output

<table><colgroup><col> <col></colgroup><tbody><tr><td><p>Type</p></td><td><p>Array of String</p></td></tr></tbody></table>

#### Associated Configurations

- [Configuration](#config)

#### Throws

- MONGO:CONSISTENCY_ERROR
- MONGO:RETRY_EXHAUSTED
- MONGO:NOT_FOUND
- MONGO:PERMISSIONS_DENIED
- MONGO:TIMEOUT
- MONGO:INVALID_INPUT
- MONGO:CONNECTIVITY

### List Indexes

`<mongo:list-indexes>`

Lists existent indexes in a collection.

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p><strong>Configuration</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Name of the configuration to use.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div><div><p>x</p></div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Collection Name</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Name of the collection.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div><div><p>x</p></div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Target Variable</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Name of the variable that stores the operationâs output.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Target Value</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Expression that evaluates the operationâs output. The expression outcome is stored in the target variable.</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p><code>#[payload]</code></p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Reconnection Strategy</strong></p></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p><a href="#reconnect">Reconnect</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#reconnect-forever">Reconnect Forever</a></p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Retry strategy in case of connectivity errors.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr></tbody></table>

#### Output

<table><colgroup><col> <col></colgroup><tbody><tr><td><p>Type</p></td><td><p>Array of <a href="#Index">Index</a></p></td></tr></tbody></table>

#### Associated Configurations

- [Configuration](#config)

#### Throws

- MONGO:CONSISTENCY_ERROR
- MONGO:RETRY_EXHAUSTED
- MONGO:NOT_FOUND
- MONGO:PERMISSIONS_DENIED
- MONGO:TIMEOUT
- MONGO:INVALID_INPUT
- MONGO:CONNECTIVITY

### Map Reduce

`<mongo:map-reduce>`

Transforms a collection into a collection of aggregated groups, as follows:

1.  Applies a supplied element-mapping function to each element, which transforms each element into
    a key-value pair.
2.  Groups the resulting pairs by key.
3.  Reduces values in each group by applying a supplied 'reduce' function coded in JavaScript.

Refer to the MongoDB documentation for more information.

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p><strong>Configuration</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Name of the configuration to use.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div><div><p>x</p></div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Collection Name</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Name of the collection to map and reduce.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div><div><p>x</p></div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Mapping Function</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>JavaScript-encoded mapping function.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div><div><p>x</p></div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Reduce Function</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>JavaScript-encoded reducing function.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div><div><p>x</p></div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Output Collection</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Name of the output collection to which to write the results. This replaces an existing collection, if any exists. This field is mandatory if the resulting objects are larger than 16 MB. If <strong>Output Collection</strong> is unspecified, the computation is performed in-memory and is not persisted.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Streaming Strategy</strong></p></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p><a href="#repeatable-in-memory-stream">Repeatable In Memory Stream</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#repeatable-file-store-stream">Repeatable File Store Stream</a></p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Configures how Mule processes streams. Repeatable streams are the default behavior.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Target Variable</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Name of the variable that stores the operationâs output.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Target Value</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Expression that evaluates the operationâs output. The expression outcome is stored in the target variable.</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p><code>#[payload]</code></p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Reconnection Strategy</strong></p></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p><a href="#reconnect">Reconnect</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#reconnect-forever">Reconnect Forever</a></p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Retry strategy in case of connectivity errors.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr></tbody></table>

#### Output

<table><colgroup><col> <col></colgroup><tbody><tr><td><p>Type</p></td><td><p>Binary</p></td></tr></tbody></table>

#### Associated Configurations

- [Configuration](#config)

#### Throws

- MONGO:CONSISTENCY_ERROR
- MONGO:RETRY_EXHAUSTED
- MONGO:NOT_FOUND
- MONGO:PERMISSIONS_DENIED
- MONGO:TIMEOUT
- MONGO:INVALID_INPUT
- MONGO:CONNECTIVITY

### Remove Documents

`<mongo:remove-documents>`

Removes all the documents that match the specified query. If a query is not specified, all documents
are removed. It is more efficient to drop a connection and re-create it than to use this operation.

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p><strong>Configuration</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Name of the configuration to use.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div><div><p>x</p></div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Collection Name</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Collection for which to remove elements.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div><div><p>x</p></div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Query</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Binary</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Query for detecting the elements to delete. Values can be <code>{"field1": "value1"}</code> or can contain operators <code>{"field1": {$gte: 1, $lt: 10}}</code>.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Target Variable</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Name of the variable that stores the operationâs output.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Target Value</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Expression that evaluates the operationâs output. The expression outcome is stored in the target variable.</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p><code>#[payload]</code></p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Reconnection Strategy</strong></p></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p><a href="#reconnect">Reconnect</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#reconnect-forever">Reconnect Forever</a></p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Retry strategy in case of connectivity errors.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr></tbody></table>

#### Output

<table><colgroup><col> <col></colgroup><tbody><tr><td><p>Type</p></td><td><p>Number</p></td></tr></tbody></table>

#### Associated Configurations

- [Configuration](#config)

#### Throws

- MONGO:DUPLICATE_ERROR
- MONGO:CONSISTENCY_ERROR
- MONGO:RETRY_EXHAUSTED
- MONGO:NOT_FOUND
- MONGO:PERMISSIONS_DENIED
- MONGO:TIMEOUT
- MONGO:INVALID_INPUT
- MONGO:CONNECTIVITY

### Remove Files

`<mongo:remove-files>`

Removes the file that matches the given file ID. If no file ID is specified, all files are removed.

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p><strong>Configuration</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Name of the configuration to use.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div><div><p>x</p></div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>File Id</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Binary</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>ID of the file to delete.</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p><code>#[payload]</code></p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Reconnection Strategy</strong></p></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p><a href="#reconnect">Reconnect</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#reconnect-forever">Reconnect Forever</a></p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Retry strategy in case of connectivity errors.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr></tbody></table>

#### Associated Configurations

- [Configuration](#config)

#### Throws

- MONGO:DUPLICATE_ERROR
- MONGO:CONSISTENCY_ERROR
- MONGO:RETRY_EXHAUSTED
- MONGO:NOT_FOUND
- MONGO:PERMISSIONS_DENIED
- MONGO:TIMEOUT
- MONGO:INVALID_INPUT
- MONGO:CONNECTIVITY

### Restore From Directory

`<mongo:restore-from-directory>`

Takes the output from the **Dump** operation, restores the output, and generates indexes. This
operation inserts records only when the IDs do not already exist in the database.

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p><strong>Configuration</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Name of the configuration to use.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div><div><p>x</p></div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Input Path</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Input path of the dump files. This path must be a directory.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div><div><p>x</p></div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Drop Collections</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Boolean</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Indicates whether to drop existing collections before performing the restore.</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p><code>false</code></p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Oplog Replay</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Boolean</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Replay oplog used for point-in-time restore.</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p><code>false</code></p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Reconnection Strategy</strong></p></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p><a href="#reconnect">Reconnect</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#reconnect-forever">Reconnect Forever</a></p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Retry strategy in case of connectivity errors.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr></tbody></table>

#### Associated Configurations

- [Configuration](#config)

#### Throws

- MONGO:DUPLICATE_ERROR
- MONGO:CONSISTENCY_ERROR
- MONGO:RETRY_EXHAUSTED
- MONGO:NOT_FOUND
- MONGO:PERMISSIONS_DENIED
- MONGO:TIMEOUT
- MONGO:INVALID_INPUT
- MONGO:CONNECTIVITY

### Restore From File

`<mongo:restore-from-file>`

Restores a single .bson file or a zip file.

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p><strong>Configuration</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Name of the configuration to use.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div><div><p>x</p></div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Collection Name</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Name of the collection to restore.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div><div><p>x</p></div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Input</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Binary</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>InputStream that points to the dump file. It can be a .bson file or a zip file.</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p><code>#[payload]</code></p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Drop Collection</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Boolean</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Indicates whether to drop existing collections before performing the restore.</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p><code>false</code></p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Reconnection Strategy</strong></p></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p><a href="#reconnect">Reconnect</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#reconnect-forever">Reconnect Forever</a></p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Retry strategy in case of connectivity errors.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr></tbody></table>

#### Associated Configurations

- [Configuration](#config)

#### Throws

- MONGO:DUPLICATE_ERROR
- MONGO:CONSISTENCY_ERROR
- MONGO:RETRY_EXHAUSTED
- MONGO:NOT_FOUND
- MONGO:PERMISSIONS_DENIED
- MONGO:TIMEOUT
- MONGO:INVALID_INPUT
- MONGO:CONNECTIVITY

### Update Documents

`<mongo:update-documents>`

Updates documents that match the specified query. If a query is not specified, all documents are
retrieved. If the multi parameter is set to `false`, only the first document matching the query is
updated. Otherwise, all documents matching the query are updated.

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p><strong>Configuration</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Name of the configuration to use.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div><div><p>x</p></div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Collection Name</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Name of the collection to update.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div><div><p>x</p></div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Query</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Binary</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Query for detecting the element to update. Values can be <code>{"field1": "value1"}</code> or can contain operators <code>{"field1": {$gte: 1, $lt: 10}}</code>.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Content To Update</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Binary</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Object to replace the document that matches the query.</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p><code>#[payload]</code></p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Multiple Update</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Boolean</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Indicates whether only the first document matching the query is updated.</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p><code>false</code></p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Upsert</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Boolean</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>If set to <code>true</code>, creates a new document when no document matches the query criteria. The default value is <code>false</code>, which does not insert a new document when no match is found.</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p><code>false</code></p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Write Concern Acknowledgement</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Level of acknowledgment requested from MongoDB for write operations propagated to the specified number of MongoDB instances. You can specify a number of instances, for example, <code>n&gt;0</code>, or use a value from the list.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Write Concern Timeout</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Number</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Specifies a time limit, in milliseconds, for <strong>Write Concern Acknowledgement</strong>. The value must be greater than <code>1</code>.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Write Concern Timeout Timeunit</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Enumeration, one of:</p></div><div><ul><li><p>NANOSECONDS</p></li><li><p>MICROSECONDS</p></li><li><p>MILLISECONDS</p></li><li><p>SECONDS</p></li><li><p>MINUTES</p></li><li><p>HOURS</p></li><li><p>DAYS</p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Time unit for the <strong>Write Concern Timeout</strong> field.</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p><code>SECONDS</code></p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Streaming Strategy</strong></p></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p><a href="#repeatable-in-memory-stream">Repeatable In Memory Stream</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#repeatable-file-store-stream">Repeatable File Store Stream</a></p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Configures how Mule processes streams. Repeatable streams are the default behavior.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Target Variable</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Name of the variable that stores the operationâs output.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Target Value</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Expression that evaluates the operationâs output. The expression outcome is stored in the target variable.</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p><code>#[payload]</code></p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Reconnection Strategy</strong></p></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p><a href="#reconnect">Reconnect</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#reconnect-forever">Reconnect Forever</a></p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Retry strategy in case of connectivity errors.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr></tbody></table>

#### Output

<table><colgroup><col> <col></colgroup><tbody><tr><td><p>Type</p></td><td><p>Any</p></td></tr></tbody></table>

#### Associated Configurations

- [Configuration](#config)

#### Throws

- MONGO:DUPLICATE_ERROR
- MONGO:CONSISTENCY_ERROR
- MONGO:RETRY_EXHAUSTED
- MONGO:NOT_FOUND
- MONGO:PERMISSIONS_DENIED
- MONGO:TIMEOUT
- MONGO:INVALID_INPUT
- MONGO:CONNECTIVITY

- [Repeatable In Memory Stream](#repeatable-in-memory-stream)
